summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a sweet, top‑tier performance that many fans rank alongside the legendary 2/15/73 show.
review: The reviewer raves about this recording as a well‑kept secret and places it “right up there with 2/15/73,” highlighting its sheer sweetness and emotional impact. Although the second set is presented out of order, it does not detract from the overall flow, and no technical flaws are mentioned, suggesting a pristine soundboard source.

ai_rating.rationale: A single, highly enthusiastic 5‑star review praises both the performance and implies excellent audio quality; lacking contradictory feedback, the rating leans toward a near‑top score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not note any sound issues; enthusiastic tone suggests a clear and well‑preserved recording.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is out of show order but the reviewer indicates it does not bother them, describing the overall flow as sweet and seamless.
